title: Case overview
noAccessHeader: You cannot access this case online
noAccessBodyEcm: This case is now being managed offline and is not available through this service.
noAccessBodyCrossCountry: This case has been transferred and is not available through this service.
transferPendingBody: Your case is being transferred. Your new case number will be available here once the transfer is complete. Please check back later.
whatThisMeansPointOne: You cannot view case details or upload documents here.
whatThisMeansPointTwo: Updates and decisions will not appear in this service.
whatHappensNextPointOne: The tribunal will contact you by post or email with updates.
whatHappensNextPointTwo: If you have any questions or need to contact the tribunal, you can do so, quoting your new case number
contactHeader: Call the Employment Tribunal customer contact centre
